title: I See What You Did There!
description: Makes mobs react to indirect damage sources, like fire or lava.
body:
Ever killed a Pillager with a banner using lava so that you don't get the Bad Omen effect?
This mod will fix that.

If the mod detects that fire/fall/water damage was caused by a player, the player will be associated with the damage, meaning neutral mobs will become angry at you.
